categories.name: BRANDING

categories.name: DIGITAL MARKETING
categories.summary: We design commercial websites that convey your brand and generate business. We position them on Google and generative AI search engines with SEO, GEO and Google Ads — so the right people find you when they search for what you offer.

quote.lineTwo: there's a strategy no one sees, but everyone feels.

passionSection.title: Three
passionSection.description: An extraordinary digital product with a weak brand competes only on functionality. A powerful brand backed by a solid product competes on preference — and preference generates premium pricing. The best marketing strategy amplifies what the brand already communicates. When identity is clear, every campaign reinforces a coherent message instead of building one from scratch. A well-built digital product is the best marketing asset that exists. A website that loads fast, works well and ranks in search engines generates more business than any isolated campaign.

testimonials.name: Farooq Khader
testimonials.description: Luis is a great web developer with amazing attention to detail. His urge for the most innovative technology prompted us to move our website to a better technology - Next.js. He was also very committed to ensuring that the results matched our designer's imagination and satisfaction. His structured programming techniques made it easier for our internal team to take over his work smoothly. His patience in collaborating with other team members/freelancers also paid off, saving time and effort for the team. I highly recommend Luis as a great web developer.

testimonials.name: Nacho Escudero
testimonials.position: Fundador/Jefe de Marketing: La Plataforma Publicitaria
testimonials.description: Luis has been a key player, who has achieved very good results adding value to the company. He is a disciplined, creative and very competitive professional. Although he is under pressure he does not lose his objective, being decisive and applying his knowledge in every situation. He has participated in very important planning and strategic decisions. He is still part of the team as an external collaborating partner

testimonials.name: Leonel (Krea) Pérez
testimonials.description: What really distinguishes Luis is his ability to focus on the details; he is fluent in multiple areas of knowledge, such as design, development and marketing. I recommend him as a professional, with him it is possible to create digital products, eye-catching websites and ideas to highlight your services and products online.

portfolio.title: Projects
portfolio.description: Branding, digital product and marketing with our own methodology. Every project reflects a brand with substance.

projects.title: Tangle
projects.description:
After completing the bootcamp at "Ironhack," I had the opportunity to do remote internships in English for 4 months at an innovative startup based in Amsterdam, the Netherlands. My contribution included executing two projects, with the standout being the creation of a website.

The initial concept for the website was designed in Figma by another team member. My task was to bring this design to life, selecting the most appropriate stack for the company's needs. Given the prevailing familiarity within the team with the MERN stack, I chose to develop the website using NextJS, aiming to improve its indexing on major browsers.

It is relevant to note that a few months after the project's completion, REACT announced its recommendation to choose one of the popular React-based frameworks in the community, among which NextJS is included. This fact validates the strategic choice made during the project development, reaffirming the quality and relevance of the selected technology.
projects.about: Tangle is a university social ecosystem that connects students within the same institution, combating loneliness in the cities across the globe.

projects.title: Top Top
projects.description:
In my third project during the Ironhack web development bootcamp, I created a mobile web application that served as a social platform for exploring nearby restaurants, adding them to favorites, and accessing their menus and reservations.

This work expanded the capabilities of my previous project, which focused on CRUD for digital menus and restaurants, by introducing a new reservations service, significantly enhancing its value for users and establishments. This experience reinforced my ability to design more sophisticated web solutions, showcasing my proficiency in using MVC, React, and libraries like Bootstrap and Framer Motion, gradually solidifying my position as a competent and versatile full-stack developer.
projects.about: Top Top Restaurants is a mobile web application that redefines the dining experience by allowing users to discover nearby restaurants as if it were a social network, and easily manage reservations.

projects.title: Big Menu
projects.description:
My second project in the Ironhack web development bootcamp was the creation of a web application designed for digital menu management in restaurants or restaurant chains. This web app allows CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete) on menus, making it easy for owners to efficiently update and maintain their culinary offerings in real-time.

For the backend logic, I implemented the Model-View-Controller (MVC) design pattern, enabling a clear and efficient code structure as well as a separation of responsibilities within the application. This architecture was crucial for keeping the project organized and facilitating its scalability.

This project not only showcases my ability to integrate various technologies in the development of complex web solutions but also demonstrates my understanding of design patterns like MVC for creating structured and maintainable web applications.
projects.about: Big Menu is a desktop web application for the efficient management of digital menus in restaurants. It enables owners to update their culinary offerings in real-time with simple operations. The MVC architecture ensures organized code and scalability.

projects.title: Gousty
projects.description:
In my first project during the web development bootcamp at Ironhack, I took on the challenge of creating a computer game. I used HTML5 and JavaScript to develop the game logic and manipulate objects on the canvas, complemented by CSS3 for the design and layout of the interface. GitHub served as the version control platform, while environment and character graphics were created using Adobe Illustrator. This project not only showcases my ability to combine front-end development with graphic design but also culminates in an interactive game that reflects my competence in integrating web technologies and design tools.

I deeply appreciate Pedro Salazar for his support in the final stage. Together, in just 3 weeks, we fulfilled a childhood dream by creating this video game, while managing other work commitments. Effective task coordination and the ability to work as a team under pressure were crucial in meeting this challenge in such a short time, demonstrating our passion and commitment to the realization of innovative projects.
projects.about: 'Gousty, The Ghost' is a vibrant platformer mini-game set in a dark forest, filled with challenging Slimes. Control Gousty with the keyboard, using his special abilities to confront enemies and overcome levels. An intense adventure awaits you, where strategy and skill are essential.

cookieConsent.title: We use cookies
cookieConsent.description: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, serve personalized content, and analyze our traffic. You can choose which cookies you allow.

necessary.title: Strictly Necessary
necessary.description: These cookies are essential for the website to function properly. They cannot be disabled.

marketing.title: Marketing

cookiePolicyPage.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicyPage.metaDescription: Learn about how Alkitu uses cookies, their purposes, and how to manage your preferences.
cookiePolicyPage.intro: This Cookie Policy explains what cookies are, how Alkitu ("we", "us", "our") uses them on our website alkitu.com (the "Website"), and your choices regarding cookies.

whatAreCookies.title: What Are Cookies?
whatAreCookies.description: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently and provide information to website owners.

howWeUse.title: How We Use Cookies
howWeUse.description: We use the following types of cookies on our Website:

necessaryCookies.title: Strictly Necessary Cookies
necessaryCookies.description: These cookies are essential for the Website to function properly. They enable core functionality such as security, language preferences, and theme settings. You cannot opt out of these cookies.

analyticsCookies.title: Analytics Cookies
analyticsCookies.description: These cookies help us understand how visitors use the Website by collecting and reporting information anonymously. This helps us improve the Website.

cookies.name: session_fingerprint
cookies.purpose: Anonymous session identifier for usage analytics

manageCookies.title: How to Manage Cookies
manageCookies.description: You can manage your cookie preferences at any time by clicking the cookie settings button on our Website. You can also configure your browser to block or delete cookies. Please note that blocking certain cookies may impact the functionality of the Website.
manageCookies.browserSettings: Most browsers allow you to control cookies through their settings. Refer to your browser's help documentation for instructions.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.description: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: If you have questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at:

privacyPolicyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicyPage.metaDescription: Learn about how Alkitu collects, uses, and protects your personal data in compliance with GDPR.
privacyPolicyPage.intro: At Alkitu, we are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal data when you visit our website alkitu.com (the "Website"), in compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and applicable data protection laws.

dataController.title: Data Controller
dataController.description: The data controller responsible for your personal data is:

dataWeCollect.title: Data We Collect
dataWeCollect.description: We may collect the following types of data:

items.title: Navigation Data
items.description: Anonymous information about how you use our Website, including pages visited, time spent, and referral sources. This data is collected via cookies only with your consent.

items.title: Contact Data
items.description: When you use our contact form, we collect your name, email address, and any message you send us.

items.title: Newsletter Data
items.description: If you subscribe to our newsletter, we collect your email address.

items.title: Technical Data
items.description: Browser type, operating system, and general geographic location (country/region). This data is anonymized and used for analytics purposes only.

legalBasis.title: Legal Basis for Processing
legalBasis.description: We process your personal data based on the following legal grounds:

items.description: For analytics cookies and newsletter subscriptions. You can withdraw your consent at any time.
For essential website functionality and security.
When you contact us to request our services.

howWeUse.title: How We Use Your Data
items: To provide and maintain our Website
To improve our Website and services based on anonymous analytics
To respond to your inquiries via the contact form
To send newsletters (only with your explicit consent)
To ensure the security and proper functioning of our Website

dataSharing.title: Data Sharing
dataSharing.description: We do not sell your personal data. We may share data with the following third-party services that help us operate our Website:

items.purpose: Database hosting and authentication (EU/US servers with adequate safeguards)
Email delivery for contact forms and newsletters

dataRetention.title: Data Retention
dataRetention.description: We retain your data only for as long as necessary for the purposes described in this policy:

yourRights.title: Your Rights Under GDPR
yourRights.description: You have the following rights regarding your personal data:

items.description: You can request a copy of the personal data we hold about you.
You can request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data.
You can request deletion of your personal data ("right to be forgotten").
You can request that we limit the processing of your data.
You can request your data in a structured, machine-readable format.
You can object to the processing of your personal data.
You can withdraw your consent at any time by adjusting your cookie settings or contacting us.

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.description: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data, including encryption, access controls, and regular security assessments.

children.title: Children's Privacy
children.description: Our Website is not directed at children under the age of 16. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.description: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: To exercise your rights or for any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

supervisoryAuthority.title: Supervisory Authority
supervisoryAuthority.description: If you believe your data protection rights have been violated, you have the right to file a complaint with your local data protection supervisory authority.

hero.title: Digital Agency in Spain
hero.text: Alkitu is a digital agency founded in early 2020 in the city of Valencia (Spain) by a pair of entrepreneurial "geeks" passionate about new technological trends. We are an agency specialized in marketing, graphic design, application development, and web pages.

origin.title: How did Alkitu originate?
origin.p1: Taking into account the different situations and imminent changes generated by the pandemic (COVID-19), many companies were forced to redesign their strategies and consider the digitalization process as an alternative to remain active in the market.
origin.p2: Starting from this and in our case, we saw an interesting opportunity that allowed us to unite three things: passion for the digital world, current demands, and the desire to support entrepreneurs in the "new normal."
origin.p3: It is not easy to face adversity, but we are sure that these scenarios allow us to bring out the best in each of us. Changes are not easy, but our intention is to create a community of "Alkians" where we can be a team of brave people with competencies, skills, vocation, and discipline who support each other to do great things.

items.title: Passion
items.description: Our work is a life choice, we want to transmit security, confidence, commitment and excellence. We like what we do and in each project we strive to exceed our clients' expectations.

items.title: Innovation
items.description: We adapt to the use of new technologies, we constantly update ourselves on new market trends and offer solutions using resources and technological innovations.

items.title: Community
items.description: Our clients, work team, allies and the community in general are our most valuable network. We work to positively influence our environment and be a reference of support, solidarity and brotherhood.

items.title: Customer Service
items.description: We care about solving our clients' problems proactively, we anticipate future needs and focus on satisfying them quickly in the best possible way.

items.title: Mission
items.description: Make the digital world accompany our clients' business strategies by offering them a personalized service according to their needs.

items.title: Vision
items.description: To be the chosen company for our innovative digital solutions and our personalized customer service. In addition to being recognized as a work team with potential, human quality and professionalism.

hero.title: Branding
hero.subtitle: We build brands with methodology, foundation and system
hero.description: Your brand is more than a logo. It is the intangible asset formed in people's minds when they connect with your company through the senses — what they see, read, hear, and experience in your space. A well-built brand can represent up to 60% of an organization's total value. At Alkitu we approach branding with a proprietary framework: Brand Engineering. A system that structures brand building in four pillars — Brand DNA, Verbal Identity, Visual Identity and Spatial Identity — inspired by the international standard ISO 20671 for brand valuation.

problem.title: The problem of building a brand in pieces
problem.description: Most companies build their brand in pieces: one designer for the logo, another for the website, an agency for social media, a consultant for strategy. The result is a fragmented brand where the logo says one thing, the website says another, and social media says a third. That fragmentation confuses the market and erodes the trust that is so hard to build. When the brand is coherent, the effect is felt across every dimension of the business.

items.name: Logo
items.description: We design the visual element that identifies and differentiates your business. Each logo starts from a defined conceptual territory and is built with criteria of meaning, structure and real-world application.

items.name: Naming
items.description: We create or find a brand name with high registrability potential. We combine phono-symbolism techniques with legal, linguistic and digital verification so the name sounds right, means what it should, and has an available domain.

items.name: Buyer Persona
items.description: We define who your ideal customer is with four levels of segmentation: demographic, geographic, psychographic and behavioral. A documented profile that guides all brand, product and communication decisions.

items.name: Social Media
items.description: We design the visual system and behavior of your brand on digital platforms: templates, avatars, covers, filters and communication parameters. All aligned with your identity.

items.name: Style Guide
items.description: We compile all the visual and verbal usage rules of your brand into a practical manual: colorimetry, typography, stationery, brand language, imagery and applications.

items.name: Brand Audit
items.description: A strategic analysis of your brand's current state to identify strengths, weaknesses and measure strategies that can be implemented to improve it.

items.name: Brand Engineering
items.description: A comprehensive, tailor-made system covering strategy and identity across every area of your business. Includes files, guides, manuals and ready-to-use resources — all built specifically for your brand.

hero.title: Digital Marketing
hero.subtitle: Measurable growth engine — from discovery to loyalty
hero.description: Digital marketing is more than having an internet presence. It is the set of strategies that allow the right person to find your business, get interested, buy and come back — and make the entire process measurable. Alkitu structures its Digital Marketing service on the Digital Value Cycle — based on Google's See-Think-Do-Care framework.

problem.title: The problem
problem.description: Many businesses invest in digital marketing without understanding what they are buying. They pay for clicks that don't convert, create content no one sees, or have a website that doesn't appear on Google or AI search engines like ChatGPT, Gemini or Perplexity. The result: money invested with no measurable return. Digital marketing works when every piece is connected: the campaign leads to a website that converts, the website is optimized for search engines, and data from each action informs the next investment.

webCore.title: The core is the website
webCore.description: Everything starts with a website. Without a well-designed, optimized and functional website, SEO, GEO and Google Ads campaigns have nowhere to direct users. The website is the center of gravity of the entire digital strategy.
items: Present your services and products with your brand identity
Capture leads through forms and calls to action
Rank organically on Google and AI search engines
Receive paid campaign traffic with pages designed to convert
Measure every interaction to make better decisions

positioning.title: Positioning and growth
positioning.description: We are Google partners. With SEO, GEO and Google Ads we make your business appear where your customers search — both in traditional search engines and generative AI engines.

items.name: Corporate Websites
items.description: The foundation of every digital strategy. We design websites that convey your brand identity, present your services and are ready to capture leads and rank in search engines.

items.name: SEO
items.description: We position your website in Google's organic results. We work on both the technical side and content to generate sustained traffic that doesn't depend on paying per click.

items.name: GEO
items.description: We optimize your brand's presence in generative AI engines — ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Copilot. We structure your content so these systems cite you as a source.

items.name: Google Ads
items.description: Paid advertising campaigns across all Google formats: Search, Display, Shopping, YouTube, Performance Max and Demand Gen. Every dollar invested is tracked to its return.

hero.title: Product Building
hero.subtitle: We design and develop custom digital products
hero.description: We create complete digital products: web apps, native iOS applications, hybrid apps, functional prototypes and design systems. From enterprise management systems and e-learning platforms to advanced e-commerce and process automation — with the right tech stack for each case. We work with UI/UX design and usability standards on every project.

problem.title: The problem
problem.description: Many companies operate with processes that depend on spreadsheets, WhatsApp and generic tools that don't adapt to how the business actually works. Information is scattered, errors repeat, and every manual step consumes time that could be spent growing. When they try to solve it, they encounter freelancers who deliver incomplete products, agencies offering adapted templates, or internal teams without the technical capacity. A well-built digital product breaks that cycle.

howWeWork.title: How we work
howWeWork.description: Every project follows a Spec-Driven Development approach: before writing code, we document exactly what will be built, how it will behave and under what criteria it validates. We design proprietary design systems for each project, ensuring visual consistency, development speed and total control.

steps.title: Spec-Driven Development
steps.description: We document the complete scope before writing a single line of code. This eliminates ambiguities, reduces rework and gives the client full visibility.

steps.title: Proprietary design systems
steps.description: Each visual component is created once, documented, tested and reused throughout the product. Greater consistency and development speed.

steps.title: Complex product experience
steps.description: Payment gateway integration, enterprise management software, e-learning platforms and commercial websites with positioning and integrated analytics.

items.name: Custom Web App
items.description: Custom web platforms: e-learning, ERP, dashboards, interactive maps, client portals, advanced e-commerce. Built with React and Next.js.

items.name: UI/UX Design
items.description: We design the complete experience of your digital product before developing it. Research, wireframes, pixel-perfect design and interactive prototype.

items.name: Functional Prototypes
items.description: High-fidelity navigable simulations in Figma. The lowest-risk way to validate an idea before investing in development.

items.name: Native iOS App
items.description: iPhone and iPad applications with Swift and SwiftUI, making the most of Apple hardware. Computer vision, wearables and on-device processing.

items.name: Hybrid Apps
items.description: iOS and Android applications simultaneously with React Native and Expo. A single codebase generating real native components.

items.name: Design Systems
items.description: Reusable component libraries that unify visual identity across all your digital products. Living documentation with Storybook and automated testing.

hero.title: Custom Web App
hero.subtitle: Custom digital platforms
hero.description: We build custom web platforms with React and Next.js. Each web app is designed, developed and deployed as a real product: with architecture built to scale, maintainable code, automated testing and complete documentation. We work with Spec-Driven Development and proprietary design systems.

examples.title: Examples of what we build
examples.description: From training platforms to enterprise management systems, each product is custom-built to solve a specific problem.

items.name: E-learning
items.description: Training platforms with courses, progress tracking, assessments and certifications

items.name: Advanced e-commerce
items.description: Stores with complex business logic and payment gateway integration

items.name: Management systems (ERP)
items.description: Internal tools for managing operations, inventory, billing or resources

items.name: Map systems
items.description: Indoor and outdoor visualization — logistics, tourism, real estate

items.name: Dashboards
items.description: Control panels with real-time data visualization

items.name: Client portals
items.description: Private areas where your clients manage their services

items.name: 3D Experiences
items.description: 3D scenes rendered in the browser, augmented reality, animated backgrounds and visual post-processing

items.name: Programmatic video
items.description: Code-generated videos — same template, thousands of variations with different data

whatYouGet.title: What you get
whatYouGet.description: Each project includes everything needed for a professional digital product.
items: External API and payment gateway integration

process.title: How we do it
process.description: A proven process that guarantees quality and visibility at every stage.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: We understand the business, the user and the real problem

steps.title: Specification
steps.description: We document the scope with Spec-Driven Development

steps.title: Design
steps.description: We create the visual and interaction experience (UI/UX)

steps.title: Construction
steps.description: We develop with production standards and proprietary design system

steps.title: Evolution
steps.description: We iterate post-launch according to needs

forWhom.title: Who is it for
forWhom.description: Companies that need a digital product that does something — not just informs.

profiles.name: Startups
profiles.description: Launching their first digital product and needing a complete technical team

profiles.name: Growing companies
profiles.description: Automating processes and needing custom tools

profiles.name: Specialized businesses
profiles.description: Needing tools that don't exist in the market

hero.title: Corporate Websites
hero.subtitle: Your digital business card
hero.description: A corporate website is designed to convey your brand identity, present your products and services clearly, and capture leads and clients continuously. All our websites adapt to mobile devices and are prepared for search engine positioning. We work with three approaches: pure code with React and Next.js, WordPress and Shopify.

code.title: 1. Pure code website (React / Next.js)
code.description: The option with the highest level of customization. Every element is designed and programmed specifically for your project, without relying on templates or CMS limitations. The result is a faster, more flexible website completely aligned with your brand identity. Includes integrated AddOns: web analytics for data from day one, and email and newsletter components to manage audience communication directly.

wordpress.title: 2. WordPress
wordpress.description: The world's most-used content management platform. We start from the WordPress base and develop a custom theme with proprietary design, custom plugins and specific functionalities for your business. You can manage and update your website content autonomously. WordPress allows extending functionality through plugins — from advanced forms to bookings, directories or private areas.

shopify.title: 3. Shopify
shopify.description: The leading e-commerce platform. We start from Shopify and develop a highly customized theme. Modular sections configurable from the visual editor, transactional emails with your brand identity, and training for autonomous management. The best option when the main goal is selling products online.

webAppRedirect.title: Need more than a corporate website?
webAppRedirect.description: If you're looking for a web application with custom functionality — process automation, data management, platforms with business logic — we solve that from Product Building with custom development.

hero.title: Brand Engineering
hero.subtitle: The comprehensive brand-building framework created by Alkitu
hero.description: Brand Engineering is a brand-building framework developed by our team. Its goal is to manualize, document and systematize every aspect of a brand — from its foundational strategy to its manifestation in physical space — into a comprehensive system that keeps all brand files, guides, manuals and brand strategy resources organized. It is inspired by the international standard ISO 20671, which defines five measurable dimensions — legal, perception, market, environment and financial — as KPIs to evaluate the effectiveness of every branding decision.

pillars.title: The 4 pillars
pillars.description: Brand Engineering structures brand building into four complementary pillars. Each covers a specific dimension of the brand.

items.name: Pillar 1 — Brand DNA
items.description: The strategic foundation. Here we define who the brand is, who it speaks to, what it promises and how it positions itself in the market.

items.name: Pillar 2 — Verbal Identity
items.description: How the brand sounds. Everything that can be read, heard or pronounced.

items.name: Pillar 3 — Visual Identity
items.description: How the brand looks. Everything that can be visually perceived.

items.name: Pillar 4 — Spatial Identity
items.description: How the brand is experienced in physical and digital space.

documentation.title: Total documentation
documentation.description: The central focus is documentation. Every decision, every criterion, every rule is recorded in a comprehensive manual. The brand can grow, expand to new markets, add vendors or change teams without losing coherence.

clientResources.title: Client resource system
clientResources.description: Every client who hires Brand Engineering receives access to a custom web app where they can view, download and manage all their brand resources.

items.name: Brand files
items.description: Logo in all formats, color palettes, fonts and graphic elements

items.name: Guides and manuals
items.description: Usage rules, application guides and complete documentation

items.name: Multimedia resources
items.description: Animations, audio, templates and all material generated during the process
